homepage.title: Home - Piston Rings Komarov s.r.o.
homepage.description: Piston Rings Komarov is a traditional manufacturer, located in the Czech Republic, with more than 85 years of experience in manufacturing piston rings, sealing rings and a wide portfolio of castings.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Home - Piston Rings Komarov s.r.o.
Piston Rings Komarov
As of November 1, 2017, Piston rings division has become a new independent company
Piston Rings Komarov s.r.o.
Our company is based on more than 85 years of tradition in
piston rings
manufacturing in Komarov, in past known as Buzuluk brand. The aim of
Piston Rings Komarov s.r.o.
is to improve the level of our products, due to our long-term experience in development and manufacturing piston and sealing rings, and last but not least to satisfy our customers.
In 2017
Hastings Manufacturing Co.
and a
Piston Rings Komarov s.r.o.
, both leading global designers and manufacturers of piston rings for the OEM and Aftermarket channels proudly announced their merge.
HASTINGS EMEA Master Catalog
